zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Tyrrell於大約1382年出生在英國艾可易亞斯特 霍登時，他的父親Thomas Heron Terrell13歲，母親Elizabeth Flaubert13歲。他於1404年與Alice Coggeshall在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1437年被列為speaker of the house of commons。他去世於1437年4月2日在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Tyrrell于大约1382年出生在英国艾可易亞斯特 霍登时，他的父亲Thomas Heron Terrell13岁，母亲Elizabeth Flaubert13岁。他于1404年与Alice Coggeshall在英国艾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1437年被列为speaker of the house of commons。他去世于1437年4月2日在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tyrrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Terrel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Terrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Tirrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Terrill
meanings: English (Cornwall; of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Tyrell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Tyrrell  .

variants.name: Trill
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived by the turnstile at the entrance to a village.
English (Sussex, also Kent): nickname, perhaps from Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (origin unknown, but perhaps Old English tyrl).

English (Sussex, also Kent) and Welsh: habitational name from one or more places named with Middle English tril(le) ‘turn, roll, whirl, spin’ (Old English tyrl), often used to describe moving water, such as Trill in Axminster (Devon), Tirle Brook (Gloucestershire and Worcestershire), and Trill Mill Brook (Oxfordshire).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Tyrrell was born about 1382, in East Horndon, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Heron Terrell, was 13 and his mother, Elizabeth Flaubert, was 13. He married Alice Coggeshall in 1404, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 1437, at the age of 56, his occupation is listed as speaker of the house of commons. He died on 2 April 1437, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Tyrrell est né environ 1382, à East Horndon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Heron Terrell, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Flaubert, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Alice Coggeshall en 1404, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 1437, à l’âge de 56 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est speaker of the house of commons. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1437, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Tyrrell um 1382 in East Horndon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Heron Terrell 13 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Flaubert 13. Er hat 1404 in Essex, England Alice Coggeshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1437, als er 56 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als speaker of the house of commons aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. April 1437 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tyrrell è nato il circa 1382 nel East Horndon, Essex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Heron Terrell, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Flaubert, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Alice Coggeshall nel 1404, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1437, all'età di 56 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come speaker of the house of commons. Morì il 2 aprile 1437, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Tyrrellが約1382年にイギリスエセックスエアスト ホールンドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Heron Terrellは13歳，母Elizabeth Flaubertは13歳であった。1404年にイギリスエセックスでAlice Coggeshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1437年，56歳の時，職業はspeaker of the house of commonsと記録されている。彼は1437年4月2日に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Tyrrell(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 에세스 이스트 호른던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Heron Terrell(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Flaubert(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 에세스에서 Alice Coggeshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1437년, 56세의 나이로 그의 직업은 speaker of the house of commons이었다. 그는 1437년 4월 2일 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Burgate, Suffolk, England: Burgate, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Tyrrell nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Heron Terrell, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Flaubert, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Coggeshall em 1404, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1437, com 56 anos, sua profissão aparece como speaker of the house of commons. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1437, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Tyrrell родился около 1382 г. в местности эаст хаурндон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Heron Terrell было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Flaubert, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Coggeshall в 1404 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1437 году, в возрасте 56 лет,  он работал по профессии speaker of the house of commons. Он умер 2 апреля 1437 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

sm.between 1411 and 1437: mai le 1411 e o'o I le 1437

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Tyrrell nació aproximadamente 1382, en East Horndon, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Heron Terrell, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Flaubert, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Alice Coggeshall en 1404, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1437, a la edad de 56 años, su ocupación registrada era speaker of the house of commons. Murió el 2 de abril de 1437, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
